content: Just as the human educational definition of reflexion frames it as a deliberate vocabulary/learning practice of re-examining past interpretations to build more accurate understanding, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to treat each prior generation as a 'vocabulary unit' to be actively memorized, quizzed on, and corrected, rather than just a raw solution to critique. This turns abstract self-critique into a structured cumulative learning routine analogous to high school language skill-building.
